title: How can i change a status in another board when a date comes?

posts.author: DastinTot (Dastin Tot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Question 1:
Board 1

  • Column “Timeline” hits the current date.

Board 2

  • Monday looks if the dates are in the timeline from Board 1
  • All Items in the timeline get a specific status.

Is that possible?

Question 2:
is it possible to change the duration of a date or a timeline column? Because the default is 30 Minutes in the calender.

Thanks
